overall.description: Static first-person view of a dimly lit cyberpunk-style apartment bedroom. The scene features an unmade bed in the foreground, a checkered accent wall, and a large window revealing a dark cityscape at night. The atmosphere is moody with green ambient lighting and warm accent lights, characteristic of high-end game engine rendering.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom with city view

agents.ego_description: stationary first-person perspective observing the bedroom interior without movement

entered.detail: Messy bed with rumpled sheets and pillows in the immediate foreground
Dark wall with distinctive black and white checkered pattern
Modern white upholstered chair against the left wall
Wooden ladder or shelving unit leaning against the checkered wall
Floor-to-ceiling window revealing dark night cityscape with distant lights
Rectangular ceiling skylight emitting greenish artificial light
Small rectangular device with orange glowing elements near the window
Dark carpeted floor extending from the bed toward the window

segments.scene_description: A static view of a cyberpunk apartment bedroom at night. The camera remains fixed on an unmade bed in the foreground, with a checkered accent wall to the left and a large window revealing a dark cityscape to the right. The room is illuminated by artificial lighting from a ceiling skylight and a glowing heater, creating a moody, atmospheric environment with no movement or action occurring.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, atmospheric perspective of a dimly lit cyberpunk bedroom that remains suspended in a moody nocturnal stillness. It begins with a fixed gaze on an unmade bed in the foreground, framed by a checkered accent wall to the left and a large window to the right. As the eye wanders across the space, the dark cityscape outside the glass contrasts with the artificial glow emanating from a ceiling skylight and a nearby heater. The scene then settles into a heavy, unchanging silence, where the interplay of green ambient light and warm accents defines the high-tech solitude of the room.
